role.description: The role of the input item.

content.description:
The content of the input item. Can be a string or an array
of content parts for multimodal input.

type.description:
The type of the input item. Typically message for
conversation messages, or specialized types like
function_call_output.

id.description: The unique ID of the input item. Used for item_reference type.

call_id.description:
The ID of the function call this output corresponds to.
Required for function_call_output type.

output.description:
The output of the function call. Required for
function_call_output type.

status.description: The status of the input item.
